title: hieracium subcaesium subsp. flocciceps
intro: Hieracium subcaesium subsp. flocciceps, commonly known as a species of the Hawkweed genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, specifically for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium subcaesium subsp. flocciceps include its ability to act as an antibacterial agent, helping to prevent infections and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or salve, and can also be made into a tea or infused oil for topical application.
